examples:
Command Example
!mar-search-files
8. Get information for USB-connected devices
Returns information for USB connected devices from McAfee Active Response.
Base Command
mar-search-usb-connected-storage-devices
Input
Argument Name

!mar-search-files
8. Get information for USB-connected devices
Returns information for USB connected devices from McAfee Active Response.
Base Command
mar-search-usb-connected-storage-devices
Input
Argument Name
Description
name: mar-search-usb-connected-storage-devices

outputs.description: USB connected storage devices vendor ID. MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Product_id USB connected storage devices product ID.
outputs.name: MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Vendor_id

outputs.description: USB connected storage devices serial number. MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Device_type USB connected storage devices type.
outputs.name: MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Serial_number

outputs.description: USB connected storage devices GUID. MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Last_connection_time USB connected storage devices last connection time.
outputs.name: MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Guid

outputs.description: USB connected storage devices user name. MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.Last_time_used_by_user
outputs.name: MAR.UsbConnectedStorageDevices.User_name
